title: Past Award Winners - Khoury College of Computer Sciences

Khoury College recipients of university awards
Huntington 100
The Huntington 100 recognizes Northeastern community members who truly embody the mission, ideals, and values of the University.
2023:
Anusha Arora, Kriston Barnes, Satwik Kamarthi, Devon Levi, Shital Waters
2022:
Max Daniels, Sara Di Bartolomeo. Unnat Goenka, Chloe Gold, Maitreyee Joshi, Margaret Morehead, Conner Nilsen, Harsh Sethia, William Stenzel, Rahul Suryadevara, Jaana Dominique Tabalon

The Compass Award recognizes exemplary seniors who demonstrated a true dedication to a core set of values: leadership, volunteerism, academic integrity, and commitment to Northeastern.
Meera Whitson (2023)
Fiona McCrae (2022)
Felicia Zhang (2021)

NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
The National Science Foundation Graduate Research Fellowship recognizes and supports outstanding students in NSF-supported science, technology, engineering, and mathematics disciplines who will pursue research-based master’s and doctoral degrees at accredited US institutions.
Derek Egolf, Liam Pavlovic, Alyssa Smith (all 2023)
Hodgkinson Award
The Hodgkinson Award recognizes top students on the basis of academic and experiential performance, and selections are made by a faculty committee.
Tejas Sathyamurthi (2023)
Max Daniels (2022)
Fulbright Scholarship
Fulbrights are awarded to exceptional students to research, study, or teach English abroad, to foster diplomacy and mutual understanding between the US and other countries.
Michael Nelson (2023)
Daniel Russotto (2018)
